name: imgx
description: Composable deterministic image processing CLI powered by libvips, ExifTool, pngquant, and cwebp.

scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run generate:artifacts
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test
